chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1584 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.5601/2022 2. For orders on office objection(s) 3. For orders on M.A No.5602/2022 4. For hearing of main case 19.04.2022 Mr. Waheed Ahmed Awan, advocate for petitioner *** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. Petitioner has sought restraining order only against respondent No.7 i.e Habib Sugar Mills Limited that they should not dispose their waste water near the land of the petitioner and that the respondents to make proper arrangement and install Tubewell at the site and depute the operator within the stipulated time. We are afraid that since the Tribunals for the purposes, as disclosed in the petition, are functioning within the respective jurisdiction, the petitioner may approach the concerned Tribunal, having jurisdiction to exhaust the remedy as available to him under the law, as these intricate questions cannot be decided under Article 199 of the Constitution, hence petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
